codeReview.summary: All three blocking issues from the prior student-onboarding review have been properly fixed. (1) The onboarding_complete flag is now only set to true on the final step (isLastStep check). (2) Fitness baseline fields (gender and fitnessLevel) are now validated as required before allowing progression from Step 5. (3) The DiagnosticQuiz component now calls the submitAssessment() API instead of calculating the level locally, and the backend has a new endpoint POST /users/onboarding/assessment for server-side scoring.

summary: Fix properly addresses all three blocking issues from student-onboarding. The onboarding_complete flag is now only set on the final step (isLastStep). Gender and fitnessLevel fields are validated as required before completing Step 5. DiagnosticQuiz now calls submitAssessment() API for server-side level calculation instead of local computation.
